results.description: ViewDocument for Users is only allowed if: owner, in viewACL, in modifyACL, in manageACL, or publicAccess is view/edit
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"ViewDocument", resource: Document::""
context: {is_authenticated: false}
entities: [
  User::"A" in [DocumentShare::"B"] {
    blocked: [],
    personalGroup: Group::"A",
  },
  Group::"A" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  Action::"EditIsPrivate",
  Action::"EditPublicAccess",
  Action::"CreateDocument",
  DocumentShare::"A",
  Action::"ViewMetadata",
  Action::"ModifyDocument",
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  DocumentShare::"B",
  Action::"AddToShareACL",
  Action::"ViewDocument",
  Action::"DeleteGroup",
  DocumentShare::"",
  Action::"DeleteDocument",
  Document::"" {
    isPrivate: true,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"B",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"A",
    owner: User::"A",
    publicAccess: "",
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"",
  },
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  User::"" in [DocumentShare::"B"] {
    blocked: [],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
]

results.description: ViewMetadata for Public is allowed if publicAccess is preview, view, or edit
Owner who is authenticated and not blocked MUST be able to ViewDocument
Owner who is authenticated and not blocked MUST be able to ModifyDocument
Owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteDocument
User in viewACL who is authenticated and not blocked MUST be able to ViewDocument
User in modifyACL who is authenticated and not blocked MUST be able to ModifyDocument
User in manageACL who is authenticated MUST be able to AddToShareACL
Public principal MUST be able to ViewDocument when publicAccess is view
